listen_host.description: Address the web UI binds to. Default 127.0.0.1 (this machine only). Use 0.0.0.0 to reach it from other devices on your LAN — set an auth_token if you do.

listen_port.description: TCP port the web UI listens on. Default 7777.

auth_token.description: Optional shared token required to use the panel. Auto-generated on first setup. Required in practice whenever listen_host is not loopback.

https_enabled.description: Serve the panel over HTTPS. Required for the microphone (and other secure-context browser APIs) on non-loopback hosts. A self-signed cert is generated under ~/.gurney/ if no cert/key paths are set.

https_cert_path.description: Path to a PEM-encoded TLS certificate. Leave blank to use the auto-generated self-signed cert at ~/.gurney/frontend-cert.pem.

https_key_path.description: Path to the PEM-encoded TLS private key for https_cert_path. Leave blank to use ~/.gurney/frontend-key.pem.

proactive.description: Whether the agent may send unprompted nudges and briefings. Mirrors the Proactive toggle in the Chat Hub.
